parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'moderation_alert', reportId: $node['Validate & Normalize Moderation Event'].json.reportId, severity: $node['Validate & Normalize Moderation Event'].json.severity, escalated: $node['Validate & Normalize Moderation Event'].json.escalated, message: '[Moderation][' + $node['Validate & Normalize Moderation Event'].json.severity.toUpperCase() + '] ' + $node['Validate & Normalize Moderation Event'].json.contentType + '#' + $node['Validate & Normalize Moderation Event'].json.contentId + ' reason=' + $node['Validate & Normalize Moderation Event'].json.reason, correlationId: $node['Validate & Normalize Moderation Event'].json.correlationId }) }}
